page_metadata.biotools__summary: Enzyme catalyzed metabolic pathway prediction server. Beginning with a query compound and chemical logic of enzymatic reactions (chemical structure transformation patterns of small molecules), biodegradation pathways of environmental compounds and biosynthesis pathways of secondary metabolites are predicted.

Beginning with a query compound and chemical logic of enzymatic reactions (chemical structure transformation patterns of small molecules), biodegradation pathways of environmental compounds and biosynthesis pathways of secondary metabolites are predicted.
